text:
was a student at Attack Junior High School whose ghost is now haunting its grounds.

Appearance

Frieda had black hair going down to her shoulders and wide, blue eyes. Her ghostly garments are white, and there is sometimes a blue glow around her. As a ghost, she is also partially transparent.

Personality

Frieda, as a ghost, likes to scare unsuspecting students at the school. Her form as a ghost is off-putting to most, however, she is still friendly and down-to-earth.

Story

When a group of students wander the school at night, Frieda prepares to scare them. She appears to Reiner Braun, before giving a creepy grin. She later sees Eren Jaeger on a stairwell and appears to him floating in a mirror. As he tries to convince himself he did not see anything, Frieda appears in front of him screaming, to Eren's horror.

Outside at the schoolyard, Frieda spots Christa Lenz and she sneaks up behind her to scare her. Before Frieda could proceed, she stops once she sees how upset Christa is, and instead asks what is wrong. Frieda then listens as Christa tells her about how she got separated from her friends.

Frieda tries to comfort Christa and says that she should not walk around late at night at the risk of becoming like her. Christa, unaware that Frieda is a ghost, says that she would not mind becoming like her. Frieda is shocked and horrified by this. She then hugs Christa and frantically tells her that she is fine the way she is and should stay that way, with Christa being oblivious to her urgency.
She then disappears when Christa reunites with Ymir, Sasha, and the others.

She is last seen sitting on top of the basketball hoop watching the others revel in the aftermath of the scare pranks and giggles as she fades away.

Relationships

Christa Lenz - Frieda quickly takes a liking to Christa, commenting on her cuteness and tells her to stay the way she is. When Christa is upset, Frieda tries to comfort her.
Eren Jaeger - She takes delight in scaring Eren. She appears in the Infinity Mirror spookily gliding across the panel with a sly smile, and later when Eren turns around, she scares him by screaming at him while upside down, making him scream in horror and tumble downstairs. She then giggles in the mirror as Eren runs away with Mikasa, Armin, Jean, and Conny following after him.

Trivia

Frieda's debut in Attack on Titan: Junior High marks the character's first ever animated appearance, as her main anime counterpart's first animated debut aired three years later.
